title: After U.S. Attacks on Iran, FIFA Grapples With How to Handle the World Cup
summary_full: Soccer’s global governing body is grappling with a World Cup first: a tournament host going to war with a participating nation.
summary_public: Soccer’s global governing body is grappling with a World Cup first: a tournament host going to war with a participating nation.
